papers.title_en: HiVLR: Hierarchical Vision-Language Reasoning for interpretable zero-shot radiography image understanding
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗视觉语言预训练模型在零样本任务中准确率低且缺乏可解释性的问题，提出了HiVLR框架。该方法通过引入分层视觉语言推理机制，实现了图像与文本在不同粒度上的深度对齐。实验表明，HiVLR在多项放射影像理解任务中表现优异，不仅显著提升了零样本识别的准确性，还通过分层推理过程增强了模型决策的透明度，为临床辅助诊断提供了更可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Medical vision-language pre-training on image-report pairs has shown greatpotential to facilitate downstream image understanding tasks. However, priorapproaches commonly exhibited limited accuracy on zero-shot image tasks, and …

papers.title_en: Machine learning models using 18F-FDG PET/CT radiomics for RAS mutation prediction and prognostic stratification in colorectal cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估一种结合临床数据与18F-FDG PET/CT影像组学特征的机器学习模型，用于预测结直肠癌患者的RAS基因突变状态及预后。通过整合多维度信息，该模型为临床提供了一种非侵入性的手段来识别基因突变并进行风险分层，有助于优化患者的个体化治疗方案。
papers.abstract_en: Objective To evaluate a machine learning (ML) model that integrates clinical dataand 2-deoxy-2-[18F] fluoro-D-glucose (18F-FDG)-PET radiomic features forpredicting RAS mutation status and prognosis in patients with colorectal cancer …

papers.title_en: ECG-LLM: Foundation Model for ECG-Based Cardiac Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床分诊中心电图（ECG）易获取但缺乏深度影像诊断信息的问题，提出了ECG-LLM基础模型。该模型通过将心电图信号与大语言模型相结合，实现了对心脏结构和功能的深度推理。ECG-LLM能够从常规ECG中提取通常需要超声心动图或磁共振才能获得的诊断信息，显著提升了心电图的临床应用价值和诊断准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Electrocardiography (ECG) is an inexpensive, standard-of-care test for cardiacsymptoms, but front-line triage often lacks immediate access to definitive imagingsuch as echocardiography (ECHO) or cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) …

papers.title_en: Citation-Aware Continual Pre-Training for Biomedical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对生物医学领域预训练模型忽略文献引用关系的问题，提出了一种引用感知的持续预训练方法。该方法通过整合论文间的引用链接这一结构化知识，增强了模型对科学研究间关联性的理解。实验证明，这种结合引用信息的方法能显著提升生物医学语言模型在下游任务中的表现，为构建更具领域深度的模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: The biomedical literature contains rich structured knowledge, including citation linksthat encode relationships between scientific studies, but such information is typicallyignored in standard language model pre-training. We propose a citation-aware …

papers.title_en: LoopCoder: Scaling Code Intelligence via Looped Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在处理复杂算法推理时的局限性，本文提出了LoopCoder。该模型借鉴了通用Transformer（UT）的思想，通过循环语言模型架构来增强代码智能。LoopCoder通过在层间共享参数并进行循环迭代，不仅优化了参数效率，还显著提升了模型在解决复杂编程逻辑和算法问题上的表现，为扩展代码智能提供了一种新的高效路径。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models (LLMs) have mastered syntax-level code generation,complex algorithmic reasoning remains a challenge, typically addressed by scalingmodel depth and parameter count. Universal Transformers (UT) offer a compelling …

papers.title_en: Beyond Single View: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Medical Multimodal Large Language Models on Multi-Image Understanding
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前医疗多模态大模型（MLLM）局限于单图理解的现状，提出了一个全新的多图理解综合基准。由于临床诊断本质上是多视图过程，该基准旨在评估模型在处理多张医疗影像时的综合分析能力。通过对现有模型的广泛测试，研究揭示了当前模型在多视图关联理解上的不足，为推动更具临床实用性的医疗AI发展提供了重要参考和评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs)have demonstrated impressive capabilities in interpreting single medical images.However, real-world clinical diagnosis is intrinsically a multi-view process, requiring …

papers.title_en: MedAct: Removing the Human Bottleneck in Benchmarking Clinical LLM Safety
papers.tldr: 针对当前临床大模型评估过度依赖多选题且人工评估成本高昂的问题，本文提出了 MedAct 框架。该框架旨在消除临床安全基准测试中的人工瓶颈，通过模拟真实临床场景而非简单的选项选择，实现对模型安全性的自动化、规模化评估。MedAct 提升了评估的真实性与效率，为临床大模型的安全部署提供了更可靠的衡量标准，解决了传统评估方法与实际医疗实践脱节的痛点。
papers.abstract_en: Most medical benchmarks for large language models test factual recall throughmultiple-choice questions, but on-the-ground physicians do not have the luxury offour options to choose from. NOHARM (Wu et al., 2025) demonstrated this limitation …

papers.title_en: DTop-p MoE: Sparsity-Controlled Dynamic Top-p MoE for Foundation Model Pre-training
papers.tldr: 本研究针对稀疏混合专家模型（MoE）中固定Top-k路由机制的局限性，提出了DTop-p MoE。该方法通过动态Top-p采样替代固定的专家数量选择，能够根据Token的难度和层级特性自适应调整计算资源分配。在保持整体稀疏性的同时，有效提升了基础模型预训练的效率与性能，为大规模模型扩展提供了更灵活的计算方案。
papers.abstract_en: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts architectures are essential for scaling model capacityefficiently, yet the standard Top-$ k $ routing imposes a rigid sparsity pattern thatignores the intrinsic variance in token difficulty and layer-specific computational …

papers.title_en: TiKMiX: Efficient Semi-Dynamic Data Mixture via Data Influence for LLM Pre-training
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型预训练中静态数据配比无法适应模型演化状态的问题，提出了 TiKMiX。这是一种基于数据影响力（Data Influence）的半动态数据混合框架，能够根据模型学习进度高效调整不同数据源的权重。TiKMiX 在不显著增加计算开销的前提下，优化了预训练过程中的数据利用率，显著提升了模型在下游任务中的最终表现，为实现更智能、高效的预训练提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: The data mixture used in the pre-training of a language model is a cornerstone of itsfinal performance. Static data mixing strategies in Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training are often suboptimal as they fail to adapt to the model's evolving learning …

papers.title_en: End-to-End Optimization of LLM-Driven Multi-Agent Search Systems via Heterogeneous-Group-Based Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在复杂搜索任务中存在的知识滞后和行为难以控制的问题，本文提出了一种基于异构群体强化学习（HGRL）的端到端优化框架。该框架通过将多智能体搜索系统（MASS）建模为异构群体，利用强化学习协同优化不同角色的智能体，显著提升了系统在处理复杂查询时的准确性和效率，为构建高性能、可控的智能搜索系统提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are versatile, yet their deployment in complex real-world settings is limited by static knowledge cutoffs and the difficulty of producingcontrollable behavior within a single inference. Multi-agent search systems (MASS) …

papers.tldr: 现代语言模型通常采用堆叠相同层的架构，导致参数在深度上均匀分布。本文挑战了这一传统设计，提出了“锥形语言模型”（Tapered Language Models），通过在不同深度非均匀地分配参数来优化模型结构。研究表明，这种改变层间参数分配比例的方法能够提升模型的效率和性能，为未来大模型架构设计提供了新的视角。
papers.abstract_en: Modern language models, including transformer, recurrent, and memory-basedvariants, share a common chassis: a stack of identical layers in which parameters areallocated uniformly across depth. This is a default inherited from the original …

papers.title_en: AutoTrainess: Teaching Language Models to Improve Language Models Autonomously
papers.tldr: 针对当前语言模型训练高度依赖人力的问题，本文提出了 AutoTrainess 框架。该框架利用具备长程任务处理能力的智能体，自主完成从数据准备到模型微调的训练全流程。研究证明，通过这种“模型教模型”的自主方式，可以有效提升语言模型的性能，显著降低了人工干预成本，为实现大模型的自我进化和持续改进提供了新的路径。
papers.abstract_en: Training language models (LMs) remains a highly human-intensive process, even asfrontier language model agents become increasingly capable at softwareengineering and other long-horizon tasks. A central challenge is that autonomous …

papers.title_en: Understanding Why Language Models Hallucinate: Testing Reasoning Against Priors
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在揭示大语言模型产生幻觉的深层机制，重点探讨了幻觉究竟源于知识匮乏还是推理失败。研究通过设计实验对比模型在面对与先验知识冲突的提示词时的表现，分析了模型内部知识与即时指令之间的竞争。结果表明，模型在推理时往往过度依赖预训练形成的先验偏见，从而违反提示词约束。这一发现为理解幻觉成因提供了新视角，强调了平衡先验知识与上下文推理的重要性。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models often produce hallucinated answers that violate prompt-levelconstraints. A key diagnostic question is whether these failures reflect missingknowledge, or whether the model has the relevant information but follows the wrong …
